UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Holds persistent identity info and user-specific preferences

uid.description: The unique user authenticated identity ID

name.description: Display name of the user profile

email.description: Work email address of the user

avatarUrl.description: HTTPS URL of the user profile picture

cognitiveFocusGoal.description: User focus target e.g. 5 hours a week

FocusSessionLog.title: FocusSessionLog
FocusSessionLog.description: Historical logged performance parameters for a cognitive focus block

id.description: Unique session ID generated via client or database

mode.description: Focus block mode: Deep Work, Light Flow, etc.

status.description: Session outcome e.g. completed or interrupted

category.description: Tag or topic e.g. Design, Research, Writing

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp for data queries sync

SavedItem.title: SavedItem
SavedItem.description: User specific bookmarks, sound configs, or pinned community posts

id.description: Unique ID for the bookmarks collection item

type.description: Type of item: Post, Noise preset, Focus preset

/users/{userId}.description: Primary user profile node to preserve settings and preferences

/users/{userId}/logs/{logId}.description: Cognitive performance entries logged for the individual user

/users/{userId}/savedItems/{itemId}.description: Bookmarks, pinned materials, or favorite audio frequency presets
